description: A medical writer must author a clinical study report (CSR) following the analysis of a completed trial.

nodes.task_description: Generate a CSR shell document using an ICH E3 compliant template.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new CSR document with all the required sections and headings.

nodes.task_description: Import the final tables, listings, and figures (TLFs) from the biostatistics department.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully embeds the statistical outputs into the CSR.

nodes.task_description: Write the narrative sections of the report, interpreting the results and summarizing the study's conclusions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes a clear and accurate interpretation of the study data.

nodes.task_description: Route the draft CSR for review by the cross-functional study team.

expected_outcome.value: Agent circulates the draft for review and comment.
